title: Mortar and Pestle Set, 4 Cup Natural Unpolished Granite Molcajete Mexicano, 8-in Extra Large Guacamole Bowl, Motar Pestel Stone Grinder for Guacamole, Salsa, Spices, Herbs, Seasonings
description:
About this item
100% GRANITE MATERIAL：This mortar is made of 100% unpolished granite material and is solid and sturdy. Mortar and pestle have been used for thousands of years and are the traditional way to crush, grind herbs and dry spices. The traditional manual grinding method can fully display the taste and aroma of cooking ingredients, and can also control the texture of ingredients to make delicious dishes without lumps.
GENEROUS CAPACITY & QUICK PREPARATION：The molcajete mexicano has a large capacity of 4 cups and a sturdy pestle of 4 inches. It can easily complete crushing, grinding or mashing ingredients. At home, delicious guacamole, salsa, pesto and others can be made in just a few minutes. Let the whole family enjoy healthy and delicious dishes.
STABLE & EFFICIENT DESIGN：The stone grinder benefits from the natural, durable and heavy characteristics of granite. With a triangular anti-slip support at the bottom, it won't slide on the kitchen countertop, ensuring a stable and reliable grinding process. The spherical pestle design offers a reliable grip and increases the grinding area, making ingredient grinding easier and more efficient while avoiding waste and countertop mess.
VERSATILE USAGE:This pestle and mortar bowl can not only be used to crush nuts, seeds, ginger and garlic, and make homemade salad dressings, sauces and various seasonings such as fresh mustard, guacamole, pesto, salsa, chutney, etc. It can also play a role in pharmacies and drugstores, grinding pills into powder for taking or hiding in pet food to meet the usage needs of different scenarios.
EASY TO CLEAN：Cleaning this mortar is very simple, saving time and energy. It is easy to wash by hand, maintain and reuse, providing users with a convenient use experience. Whether it is for daily use or long-term maintenance, it is very convenient and is a powerful helper in the kitchen.
reviews_5s: I purchased two of these as gifts for my daughters, and both were extremely happy. They’re quite beautiful, and the quality is very high.Product love itVery large bowl, nice and sturdy, heavy and well made! The pestle is comfortable to hold and it does a good job with making home made chimichuriFirst off, this thing is a beast. It's well made, it's solid and it is roomy. So, if you're looking for something that is more than just a nice decoration for the kitchen, this is it. That said, beyond it being extremely functional and well made, it's beautiful, both in form and in the beauty of the natural granite. I am so pleased with this and see it becoming an integral part of our kitchen.
